name: Synergized Prospectus

topRankStats: Fires a spark that seeks out the nearest enemy in 30m, dealing 300 <DT_ELECTRICITY_COLOR>Electricity Damage in a 10m radius. The spark ricochets up to 7x, seeking out the nearest enemy in 30m.
